description: Get ready to promote your back to school sale with a unique, eye-catching email template. This design, featuring a dark and light blue color scheme, is perfect for showcasing your school supplies and merchandising. With a four-column layout, you can easily highlight a variety of products, ensuring your customers don't miss out on any discount opportunities. The handwritten font adds a personal touch, making your promotion even more engaging. Whether you're selling notebooks, pens, backpacks, or clothing, this template will help you boost your sales and create a buzz for the new school year. Ideal for education and product promotion, this design is a must-have tool for your back to school marketing strategy.
short_description: Promote your back to school sale with this unique email template. Highlight discounts on school supplies and merchandising with a four-column layout and engaging handwritten font. Perfect for education and product promotion, boost your sales for the new school year.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
